summary: 5 findings: 1 CRITICAL (rank_bm25 missing from requirements.txt), 2 MEDIUM (no upper bounds, product name inconsistency), 2 LOW (hardcoded venv path, hardcoded model path)

entries.title: Missing required dependency - rank_bm25 not in requirements.txt
entries.problem: rank_bm25 is imported in vector_store.py:27 and is a core feature (Hybrid Retrieval: BM25 + Vector search). Documented in CONFIGURATION.md troubleshooting and AFOMIS.spec hiddenimports, but absent from requirements.txt.
entries.fix: Add rank-bm25>=0.2.0 to requirements.txt under the embeddings/vector store section
entries.evidence: vector_store.py:27 imports rank_bm25; AFOMIS.spec:25 declares it as hidden import; README.md:10 advertises BM25

entries.title: No upper bounds on package versions
entries.problem: All 16 packages use only minimum version constraints (>=X.Y.Z) without upper bounds, allowing potentially breaking changes from future major version upgrades.
entries.fix: Add upper bounds for all packages or use a lock file strategy

entries.title: Hardcoded product name AFOMIS inconsistent with build.py DocumentQA
entries.problem: build_exe.bat hardcodes AFOMIS in echo statements while build.py:91 uses DocumentQA as executable name, creating naming inconsistency.
entries.fix: Extract product name to a variable; verify consistency with build.py output name

entries.title: Hardcoded virtual environment path may not match developer setup
entries.problem: Script assumes .venv\Scripts\activate.bat but developers may use different venv names.
entries.fix: Add check for common virtual environment names or require venv to be present

entries.title: Hardcoded model path in build validation
entries.problem: Build script checks for bundled model at hardcoded path bundled_models\bge-small-en-v1.5\ which won't adapt to model changes. CONFIGURATION.md documents RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL as configurable.
entries.fix: Extract model name to a configurable variable at script top
